checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.shipping_lalamove_only: Lalamove instant delivery (real-time quote based on shipping address)
checkout.delivery_unavailable_alert: Instant shipping has not been set up and checkout is currently unavailable. Please contact the store or try again later.
checkout.use_points_label: Use points for deduction (%d points = 1 HKD)
checkout.wallet_zero_hint: Amount due is 0. Your wallet will cover the full payment. Click "Confirm Order" below to continue.
checkout.district_placeholder: For example: Central, Tsim Sha Tsui
checkout.hint_village_or_street: Please provide either estate/building complex or street address.
checkout.map_help: Tap a location on the map to autofill address details.
checkout.map_locate_unsupported: Your browser does not support geolocation. Please pin a location manually.
checkout.map_locate_denied: Location permission is disabled. Enable it in browser settings or pin a location manually.
checkout.map_locate_timeout: Location request timed out. Please check your connection or pin a location manually.
checkout.map_locate_failed: Unable to get your location. Please try again or select on the map manually.
checkout.map_resolve_failed: Unable to resolve address. Please enter address details manually.
checkout.map_maptiler_fallback: MapTiler is unavailable. Switched to OpenStreetMap (OSM).
checkout.map_address_edited_hint: Address fields were edited. Shipping fee will be calculated from the pinned map location.
checkout.map_address_changed_confirm: You changed auto-filled address fields. Confirm the map pin still matches this address.
checkout.js_alert_required: Please complete required shipping information (including phone number and building name).
checkout.js_alert_village_or_street: Please provide either estate/building complex or street address.
checkout.js_alert_save_address_failed: Failed to save address. Please try again later.
checkout.js_empty_cart: Your cart is empty. Please add items first.
checkout.js_confirm_remove_line: Are you sure you want to remove this item?
checkout.js_err_stripe_module: Failed to load card payment module. Please try again later.
checkout.js_alert_paypal_load_failed: Failed to load PayPal. Please try again later.
checkout.js_err_select_card: Please choose card payment and enter your card details.
checkout.js_err_need_payment_auth: Payment authorization is required before checkout.
checkout.js_err_order_confirm_retry: Failed to confirm order. Please try again later.
checkout.js_err_checkout_retry: Checkout failed. Please try again later.
checkout.js_err_stripe_not_configured: Stripe is not configured, please use another payment method
checkout.js_err_create_payment_retry: Unable to create payment request. Please try again later.
checkout.js_alert_paypal_error: PayPal error. Please try again later.
checkout.js_lalamove_shipping_unavailable: Lalamove quote is temporarily unavailable, please check the address or try again later.
checkout.js_lalamove_disclaimer: Shipping fee is quoted by Lalamove. Final fee is based on checkout confirmation.
checkout.js_lalamove_waiting: Please wait while shipping fee is being updated...
checkout.js_map_relocate_required: Address has changed. Please repin on the map to refresh shipping fee.
checkout.js_map_require_pin_for_quote: Please pin your location on the map to get an accurate Lalamove quote.
